title: AT — точное время
rule: at + точное время и точки суток: at 5 o'clock, at noon, at midnight, at night
examples: The meeting starts at 9 o'clock.
We had lunch at noon.
He came home at midnight.
I can't sleep at night.

title: ON — дни и даты
rule: on + дни недели, даты, конкретные дни: on Monday, on the 1st of May, on my birthday
examples: See you on Monday.
The party is on my birthday.
School starts on the 1st of September.
We met on a cold winter day.

title: IN — месяцы, годы, сезоны
rule: in + месяцы, годы, сезоны, века: in May, in 2020, in winter
examples: She was born in May.
We moved here in 2020.
It snows a lot in winter.
Life was different in the 19th century.

title: IN — части дня
rule: in + части дня с артиклем: in the morning, in the afternoon, in the evening (но: at night)
examples: I drink coffee in the morning.
Call me in the evening.
He sleeps in the afternoon.

title: AT — праздники как период
rule: at + праздничный период целиком: at Christmas, at Easter (но: on Christmas Day)
examples: We visit family at Christmas.
People eat eggs at Easter.
The city is empty at the weekend.

title: IN — через (о будущем)
rule: in + отрезок времени = через: in an hour = через час, in two days = через два дня
examples: The train leaves in ten minutes.
I'll be back in an hour.
The results will be ready in two days.

title: FOR — продолжительность
rule: for + сколько длилось: for two years, for a week, for a long time
examples: I lived there for two years.
We talked for an hour.
She has known him for a long time.

title: SINCE — точка отсчёта
rule: since + момент начала: since 2010, since Monday, since childhood
examples: I have worked here since 2015.
It has been raining since morning.
We haven't met since school.

title: DURING — во время
rule: during + событие/период: during the meeting, during the war, during the day
examples: Please don't talk during the film.
He fell asleep during the meeting.
The shop is closed during lunch.

title: AT — точка, место события
rule: at + точка или место события: at the bus stop, at the door, at a party, at work
examples: I'll wait at the bus stop.
Someone is at the door.
We met at a party.
She is at work now.

title: IN — внутри
rule: in + внутри объёма: in the room, in the car, in the box, in the water
examples: The keys are in my bag.
He is sitting in the car.
There is milk in the fridge.

title: ON — на поверхности
rule: on + поверхность: on the table, on the wall, on the floor
examples: Your phone is on the table.
There is a picture on the wall.
The cat is lying on the floor.

title: IN — города и страны
rule: in + города, страны, регионы: in Prague, in France, in Europe
examples: She lives in Prague.
They have an office in France.
It is the best beach in Europe.

title: ON — этаж
rule: on + этаж: on the second floor, on the top floor
examples: We live on the third floor.
The café is on the ground floor.

title: AT — учреждение как функция
rule: at + место в его роли: at school, at university, at the airport, at the doctor's
examples: The kids are at school.
She studies at university.
We arrived at the airport early.

title: TO — направление
rule: to + куда: go to school, move to London, come to me (но: go home — без to)
examples: I go to work by metro.
They moved to London.
Come to my place tonight.

title: INTO — внутрь (движение)
rule: into + движение внутрь: come into the room, jump into the water
examples: He walked into the room.
She jumped into the pool.
Put the milk into the fridge.

title: OUT OF — изнутри наружу
rule: out of + движение наружу: get out of the car, take it out of the box
examples: He got out of the car.
She took a book out of her bag.
The cat ran out of the house.

title: FROM — откуда, источник
rule: from + откуда/от кого: come from work, a letter from a friend, from Russia
examples: He just came from work.
I got a letter from an old friend.
She is from Italy.

title: BY — транспорт
rule: by + транспорт без артикля: by car, by bus, by plane (но: on foot)
examples: We travel by car.
She goes to work by bus.
It's faster by plane.

title: ON — on foot (пешком)
rule: пешком = on foot (не by foot!)
examples: I go to school on foot.
The centre is close — let's go on foot.

title: BY — автор и способ
rule: by + автор или способ: a book by Tolstoy, pay by card, learn by heart
examples: It is a novel by Tolstoy.
Can I pay by card?
She learned the poem by heart.

title: WITH — инструмент и компания
rule: with + чем/с кем: cut with a knife, write with a pen, dinner with friends
examples: Cut the bread with a knife.
I went there with my friends.
Open it with this key.

title: ABOUT — о чём
rule: about + тема: talk about work, a film about war, worry about money
examples: Let's talk about your plans.
It's a film about space.
He always complains about the weather.

title: OF — принадлежность части
rule: of + чей/чего: the roof of the house, the end of the film, a cup of tea
examples: The roof of the house is red.
I missed the end of the film.
Would you like a cup of tea?

title: FOR — для, за
rule: for + для кого/за что: a gift for you, thanks for your help, pay for dinner
examples: This gift is for you.
Thanks for your help.
He paid for dinner.

title: BETWEEN — между двумя
rule: between + два объекта: between the bank and the café (among — среди многих)
examples: The shop is between the bank and the café.
Choose between tea and coffee.
There is a secret between us.

title: ON — связь и медиа
rule: on + каналы и связь: on the phone, on TV, on the internet, on the radio
examples: She is on the phone right now.
I saw it on TV.
You can find everything on the internet.

senses.example: I listen to music every day.
She looks after her little brother.
We are waiting for the bus.
This car belongs to my father.
I'll deal with this problem tomorrow.
She dreams of a big house.
Italy is famous for its food.
Who is responsible for this project?
She is married to a doctor.
We arrived in Prague at night.
She applied for a new job.
He spends a lot on clothes.
The team consists of five people.
You remind me of my brother.
The cream protects skin from the sun.
She graduated from university last year.
I borrowed money from a friend.
